item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is great, and god I love The Night Hauler. Love your characters.

1+

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love the article itself, pretty crazy stuffs going on. But, uh, it seems some veeeeery sloppy fixing has been done. Item # missing, link tags not working, etc.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Let's ride! YEEEEEEEEHAAAAAAA-

Truly the best possible ending +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I would like to translate this article into Japanese.
However, I can't find a description of the copyright of the image.
I tried searching the Internet for information about it and found this web page.
Is it the source of the image?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I like to think that that last incident log is the birth of Joey Fucknuts Steelwings.

e: got Joey's name wrong, oops

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Oh man - the sheer American 'cheese' of it - only country in the world that let's Kraft call it's dinner cheese, so, that's special.

I really loved this article, especially for doing the description up so proper and taking a realistic stance containment - "Who's fucking gonna come down here?". Well, this incident might change that, dunno if the article needs to include revisions in light of it tho, obviously the articles can't be up to date.

But the cheese man…XD

Know what, I think it's earned. If nothing else as an old school kind of trolling. "You think this is so serious? Have a trucker!" And, I can imagine a version of this that took itself seriously and spoiled the fun (start with swapping the hat to a fedora and watch it burn from there). Yeah, I can feel this. Plus, kinda reminds me of my former step-dad during his trucking/meth days.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
So what you're saying is SCP-3889 practices catch-and-release fishing?

I enjoyed this, well done. I have questions about how the corpses are chosen at the rate of one per day from the millions we produce daily, if their speech is always intelligible in English or in whatever the observer's language is…but very nice.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: My feeling is that Anchor McAnchorton, being either a collective or an entity that derives it's power from the will of souls who want to help, is some kind of guard against Sheogorath over there. That's the metaphorical weight that it bears.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
So they're all linked?

/steeples fingers and leans forwards

I should start paying attention.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That is a terrible standard by which to decide upvotes.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Full of atmosphere and suggested meaning that is way out of my grasp, even with those attached articles. Something is definitely going on here, that's for sure, but hell if I know what!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: tl;dr but cool pic for that I'll upvote

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You're on the highway to great things, friend. Keep it up; I'm looking to see where you're going with this.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
21:34 TheGreatSea: ^ i got a hot new skip for you fine folks if you wanna read. it's got corpses and ghost truckers and whatnot
21:35 PeppersGhost: TheGreatSea: how many corpses are we talking about here
21:35 TheGreatSea: PeppersGhost: a big ol' pile of 'em, about 7 meters high
21:35 PeppersGhost: You have my attention

I haven't read the associated articles so I'm pretty lost on what exactly happened here. However, it was an enjoyable read that left me wanting to know more, so +1.

item.title: uuuggghhhh
item.content:encoded:
1 When the heavens above did not exist,
2 And earth beneath had not come into being—
3 There was Apsû, the first in order, their begetter,
4 And demiurge Tia-mat, who gave birth to them all;
5 They had mingled their waters together
6 Before meadow-land had coalesced and reed-bed was to be found —
7 When not one of the gods had been formed

-the Enuma Elish

don't fret. the there's always more, the further down you go.

a big thanks to everyone in chat that helped me go over this. you know who you are.

and thank you, reader, for being there. ♥
